title: Tennis-court arrival, helmets on
prompt: Wide cinematic shot of @tennis-court — outdoor green tennis court with white painted lines, low net softly visible BACKGROUND, chain-link fence around perimeter, soft warm afternoon light. POSITION LOCK — Sara stays standing on the LEFT side of the court throughout. Eva stays standing on the RIGHT side of the court throughout, opposite to Sara. Neither girl moves across the court. @Sara already CENTER-LEFT standing on the green court surface with both feet planted, ponytail with bow visible under @pink-helmet (helmet buckled), both hands softly clasped at her chest in a 'we're HERE!' arrival pose, beaming with cheerful kid energy. Sara has exactly two arms and two hands visible — both clasped at chest. Sara stays at this exact spot throughout the entire 10s. @Eva already CENTER-RIGHT standing on the green court surface a few steps from Sara with both feet planted, curly blonde hair softly visible under @teal-helmet (helmet buckled), both hands softly raised in cheerful celebration at chest height. Eva has exactly two arms and two hands visible — both raised at chest. Eva stays at this exact spot throughout the entire 10s. (BEAT 1 — 0-5s) Sara looks around the court with cheerful kid-wonder, helmet still on, both hands still clasped at her chest. Sara (cheerful warm kid-voice): "We MADE it!" (BEAT 2 — 5-10s) Eva claps her hands together softly with delight, both hands still up at her chest. Eva (cheerful giggle, beaming): "We zoomed all the way! Even with helmets!" Both girls grin together, helmets still on, both stationary on the court. Calm cheerful warm kid-show ambiance throughout. STRICT ANATOMY: Sara has exactly two arms and two hands at all times — both clasped at chest. Eva has exactly two arms and two hands at all times — both at chest. Both girls stay grounded with both feet planted on the green tennis court throughout — no leaping, no jumping, no running. Helmets stay buckled and on heads throughout. The tennis court stays plain clean — no marks, no red, no debris.
